lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆ ਉਤਰੈ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਭੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: dehi naam santokheea utarai man kee bhukh |
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Name, and make me content; may the hunger of my mind be satisfied.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਜਿ ਮੰਗਣਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਦੁਖਾ ਕੈ ਦੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: vin tudh hor ji manganaa sir dukhaa kai dukh |
lines.english: To ask for any other than You, Lord, is the most miserable of miseries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਐਸਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so aisaa daataar manahu na veesarai |
lines.english: Such is that Great Giver; may I never forget Him from my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਵਣੁ ਤਿਣੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਕੀਤਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਆ ਮਨੁਖ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur van tin hariaa keetiaa naanak kiaa manukh |2|
lines.english: The Guru has made the woods and meadows green again. O Nanak, is it any wonder that He blesses human beings as well? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਲੁਕਿ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar sang kiaa ko luk karai |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, He is with us; how can we hide anything from Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਨ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਚਸਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾ ਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gharree na muhat chasaa tis bin naa sarai |
lines.english: I cannot survive without Him, for an instant, for a moment, for a second.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਤਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat giaanee tapaa jis kirapaa karai |
lines.english: He alone is a devotee, a spiritual teacher, and a disciplined pratictioner of meditation, whom the Lord has so blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਲੁ ਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so pooraa paradhaan jis no bal dharai |
lines.english: He alone is perfect and renowned as supreme, whom the Lord has blessed with His power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਤਿ ਰਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਸੋ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis pat rakhai aap so bhavajal tarai |
lines.english: One whose honor He Himself has preserved, crosses over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਨਿ ਧਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis hee miliaa sach mantru gur man dharai |3|
lines.english: And he alone meets the True Lord, within whose mind the Guru's Mantra is implanted. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਜਰਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਸੋਈ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiseh jaraae aap soee ajar jarai |
lines.english: He alone endures the unendurable, whom the Lord inspires to endure it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਜੰਤ ਸੁਹਾਵੜੇ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਪਦੇ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su jant suhaavarre jo guramukh japade naau |
lines.english: Blessed are those beautiful people who, as Gurmukh, chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਰਾਗ ਸੁਰੰਗੜੇ ਆਲਾਪਤ ਸਭ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su raag surangarre aalaapat sabh tikh jaae |
lines.english: Blessed are those beautiful Ragas which, when chanted, quench all thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਧੂੜਿ ਹਮ ਬਾਛਦੇ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee dhoorr ham baachhade karamee palai paae |
lines.english: I yearn for the dust of their feet; by His Grace, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕੁ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee ik man ik araadhiaa tin sad balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who single-mindedly worship and adore the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਗੋਵਿਦ ਕੈ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo rate rang govid kai hau tin balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who are imbued with love for the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਾ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aakhaa birathaa jeea kee har sajan melahu raae |
lines.english: I tell them the state of my soul, and pray that I may be united with the Sovereign Lord King, my Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai melaaeaa janam maran dukh jaae |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has united me with Him, and the pains of birth and death have departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਗਮ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਨਤ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak paaeaa agam roop anat na kaahoo jaae |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has found the inaccessible, infinitely beautiful Lord, and he will not go anywhere else. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਵੇਲਾ ਘੜੀ ਧੰਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਮੂਰਤੁ ਪਲੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su velaa gharree dhan dhan moorat pal saar |
lines.english: Blessed is that time, blessed is that hour, blessed is that second, excellent is that instant;

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਸੰਜੋਗੜਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਡਿਠਾ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su dinas sanjogarraa jit dditthaa gur darasaar |
lines.english: blessed is that day, and that opportunity, when I gazed upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀਆ ਇਛਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man keea ichhaa pooreea har paaeaa agam apaar |
lines.english: The mind's desires are fulfilled, when the inaccessible, unfathomable Lord is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਤੁਟਾ ਮੋਹੜਾ ਇਕੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai tuttaa moharraa ik sach naam aadhaar |
lines.english: Egotism and emotional attachment are eradicated, and one leans only on the Support of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਲਗਾ ਸੇਵ ਹਰਿ ਉਧਰਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak lagaa sev har udhariaa sagal sansaar |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, one who is committed to the Lord's service - the whole world is saved along with him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹਣੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਦਿਤੀਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sifat salaahan bhagat virale diteean |
lines.english: How rare are those who are blessed to praise the Lord, in devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਉਪੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਫਿਰਿ ਪੁਛ ਨ ਲੀਤੀਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saupe jis bhanddaar fir puchh na leeteean |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with the Lord's treasures are not called to give their account again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਗਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਸੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis no lagaa rang se rang ratiaa |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with His Love are absorbed in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਇਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਇਕਾ ਉਨ ਭਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: onaa iko naam adhaar ikaa un bhatiaa |
lines.english: They take the Support of the One Name; the One Name is their only food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਰਬੁ ਓਨਾਹਾ ਜੋਗਈ ॥
lines.translit: onaa piaaraa rab onaahaa jogee |
lines.english: Their Beloved Lord belongs to them alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਜਗੁ ਭੁੰਚੈ ਭੋਗਈ ॥
lines.translit: onaa pichhai jag bhunchai bhogee |
lines.english: For their sake, the world eats and enjoys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਜਿ ਖਸਮੈ ਭਾਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree tin ji khasamai bhaaniaa |4|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who are pleasing to their Lord and Master. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਇ ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis miliaa gur aae tin prabh jaaniaa |
lines.english: The Guru comes and meets them; they alone know God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਜਣੋ ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੈ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har iko meraa sajano har ikasai naal mai sang |
lines.english: The Lord is my only friend; my companionship is with the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੈ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੈ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ikasai naal mai dosatee har ikasai naal mai rang |
lines.english: My friendship is with the One Lord alone; I am in love with the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੈ ਗੋਸਟੇ ਮੁਹੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਕਰੈ ਨ ਭੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ikasai naal mai gosatte muhu mailaa karai na bhang |
lines.english: My conversation is with the One Lord alone; He never frowns, or turns His face away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣੈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਮੋੜੈ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaanai birathaa jeea kee kade na morrai rang |
lines.english: He alone knows the state of my soul; He never ignores my love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਦਾਤਿਆ ਜਗ ਹਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: har iko meraa daataar hai sir daatiaa jag hath |
lines.english: The Lord is my only Giver. He places His hand upon the heads of the generous in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਸਲਤੀ ਭੰਨਣ ਘੜਨ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: har iko meraa masalatee bhanan gharran samarath |
lines.english: He is my only counselor, all-powerful to destroy and create.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੈ ਦੀ ਮੈ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ikasai dee mai ttek hai jo sir sabhanaa samarath |
lines.english: I take the Support of the One Lord alone; He is all-powerful, over the heads of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੰਤੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧਰਿ ਕੈ ਹਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sant milaaeaa masatak dhar kai hath |
lines.english: The Saint, the True Guru, has united me with the Lord. He placed His hand on my forehead.
